videos.title: Jeep Wheels - Steel vs Alloy. Beadlock vs Non. We're Going There!
videos.description:
Steel vs alloy. Beadlock vs non. 
Two dudes. Zero diplomacy. 
Let's go.

#JeepLife #AlloyWheels #Beadlock

Paul and The Ginger walk straight into one of the most argued about topics in Jeep culture and refuse to apologize for their opinions.

Wheels. The decision every Jeep owner spends way too much time on, way too much money on, and way too much time defending on the internet afterward.
And for good reason...because it actually matters.

Steel or alloy. Beadlock or non. Offset, backspacing, si

videos.title: Power Apps Vibe + SharePoint Lists: Build a React App in Minutes 🤯
videos.description:
In this video, I show you the brand new Power Apps Vibe experience with SharePoint Lists — and how to build a real React-based application in minutes without writing traditional Power Fx formulas.

This isn’t just a demo. This is an example of a real-world app built step-by-step using modern, AI-assisted development.

🔥 What you’ll learn:
→ Connect multiple SharePoint Lists using the new Vibe coding experience
→ How Power Apps Vibe generates a React-based app
→ Build a complete Issue Tracker app

videos.title: Where the Economy Thrives After AI
videos.description:
A new economic argument suggests AI won’t simply wipe out work, but will shift value toward the parts of the economy where human presence, provenance, care, taste, and relationship matter most. NLW explores Alex Imas' case for a post-commodity economy, why automation may make relational work more valuable, and how the AI jobs debate is missing the question of what new demand gets unlocked when supply becomes abundant.

Source: ⁠https://aleximas.substack.com/p/what-will-be-scarce⁠

SIGN UP FOR OU
